## Type of change

<!-- Pick one -->
- [ ] `feat` — new component or API
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / CI / deps
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change

## Test plan

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test:once`
- [ ] `pnpm -F @vllnt/ui test:visual` (if UI changed)
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual verification:

## Breaking changes

None.

## Checklist

- [ ] Component(s) follow the conventions in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).
- [ ] New exports added to `packages/ui/src/index.ts`.
- [ ] Tests added (unit + visual, as applicable).
- [ ] CHANGELOG note added under `[Unreleased]` for user-facing changes.
- [ ] No `any`, `as`, `@ts-ignore`, or `eslint-disable` added.
